rules.rule: procedural images MUST be ordered by procedural step_index; gaps are detected and flagged.
missing-step visuals MUST emit a continuity-event with kind='missing-step-visual'.
orphan visual assets (no grounding) MUST emit a continuity-event with kind='orphan-asset'.
broken image lineage (image_id referenced by a grounding but absent from the asset ledger) is fail-closed.
broken continuity blocks publication-ready promotion of the corresponding visual publication build.
reviewer override MUST be explicit, attributed, and recorded as a continuity-event with kind='reviewer-accepted-gap'.
